name: memory_bank_panel
description: S5.K -- Ctrl+M toggles the View > Memory Bank AUI pane. Panel is hidden by default; once shown, its widget and most toolbar controls are addressable through UIA. Asserts the panel itself plus the controls that wxWidgets' MSAA bridge surfaces reliably: the Source / Tag combo boxes, the pinned-only / show-deleted / delete / pin / tag buttons, the list pane, the detail Edit, and the Save button. The `locus.memory_bank.search` wxTextCtrl is intentionally NOT asserted here -- single-line wxTextCtrl with wxTE_PROCESS_ENTER style does not reach the UIA tree when created inside an initially-hidden AUI pane (wxWidgets-MSW internal behaviour; the detail_content_ control with wxTE_MULTILINE shows up fine). Same shape as the chat input's wxTE_RICH2 limitation already documented in AGENTIC_TESTING.md. Toggling on / off + screenshots cover the surface that matters; the wxWidgets-side fix is out of scope.
